title: Add registry/router support for semantic memory tools
summary: Wire semantic memory and resume-intent tools into the registry/router and enforce required parameters.
outputs: Updated tool registry and router supporting semantic memory APIs
Updated main entry wiring for semantic memory tools
acceptance_criteria: Tool registry exposes semantic memory/update tools required by 0.4.0 flow.
Router validates required parameters and returns deterministic errors for missing fields.
Main wiring includes new tool handlers without regressions.

steps.description: Add semantic memory tool definitions with required schema fields.
Update router validation to enforce required parameters.
Wire new tool handlers into the main entry point.

notes: Align with Phase 2 semantic memory rules.
Keep errors short and deterministic for resume safety.
